ddls:
CREATE TABLE "trips" (
  "trip_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each trip */,
  "medallion" TEXT /* Medallion number of the taxi */,
  "hack_license" TEXT /* Hack license of the taxi */,
  "vendor_id" TEXT /* ID of the vendor operating the taxi */,
  "rate_code" INTEGER /* Rate code for the trip */,
  "store_and_fwd_flag" TEXT /* Store-and-forward flag for the trip */,
  "pickup_datetime" TEXT /* Pickup date and time */,
  "dropoff_datetime" TEXT /* Dropoff date and time */,
  "passenger_count" INTEGER /* Number of passengers */,
  "trip_time_in_secs" INTEGER /* Trip duration in seconds */,
  "trip_distance" REAL /* Trip distance */,
  "pickup_location_id" INTEGER /* ID of the pickup location */,
  "dropoff_location_id" INTEGER /* ID of the dropoff location */,
  "pickup_longitude" REAL /* Longitude of the pickup location */,
  "pickup_latitude" REAL /* Latitude of the pickup location */,
  "dropoff_longitude" REAL /* Longitude of the dropoff location */,
  "dropoff_latitude" REAL /* Latitude of the dropoff location */,
  "trip_status" TEXT /* Status of the trip */,
  "payment_method" TEXT /* Payment method used for the trip */,
  "payment_amount" REAL /* Total payment amount for the trip */,
  "tip_amount" REAL /* Tip amount for the trip */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("trip_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_trips_store_and_fwd_flag FOREIGN KEY ("store_and_fwd_flag") REFERENCES store_and_fwd_flags ("store_and_fwd_flag"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_trips_vendor_id FOREIGN KEY ("vendor_id") REFERENCES vendors ("vendor_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_trips_medallion FOREIGN KEY ("medallion") REFERENCES medallions ("medallion"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_trips_pickup_location_id FOREIGN KEY ("pickup_location_id") REFERENCES pickup_locations ("location_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_trips_dropoff_location_id FOREIGN KEY ("dropoff_location_id") REFERENCES dropoff_locations ("location_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_trips_hack_license FOREIGN KEY ("hack_license") REFERENCES hack_licenses ("hack_license"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_trips_rate_code FOREIGN KEY ("rate_code") REFERENCES rate_codes ("rate_code")
)

CREATE TABLE "vendors" (
  "vendor_id" TEXT /* ID of the vendor */,
  "vendor_name" TEXT /* Name of the vendor */,
  "contact_email" TEXT /* Contact email for the vendor */,
  "vendor_address" TEXT /* Address of the vendor */,
  "vendor_phone" TEXT /* Phone number of the vendor */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("vendor_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "medallions" (
  "medallion" TEXT /* Medallion number of the taxi */,
  "vendor_id" TEXT /* ID of the vendor operating the taxi */,
  "medallion_type" TEXT /* Type of medallion (e.g., yellow, green) */,
  "medallion_status" TEXT /* Status of the medallion */,
  "medallion_expiration_date" TEXT /* Expiration date of the medallion */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("medallion")
)

CREATE TABLE "hack_licenses" (
  "hack_license" TEXT /* Hack license of the taxi */,
  "vendor_id" TEXT /* ID of the vendor operating the taxi */,
  "license_type" TEXT /* Type of license (e.g., taxi, livery) */,
  "license_status" TEXT /* Status of the license */,
  "license_expiration_date" TEXT /* Expiration date of the license */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("hack_license")
)

CREATE TABLE "rate_codes" (
  "rate_code" INTEGER /* Rate code for the trip */,
  "rate_code_description" TEXT /* Description of the rate code */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("rate_code")
)

CREATE TABLE "store_and_fwd_flags" (
  "store_and_fwd_flag" TEXT /* Store-and-forward flag for the trip */,
  "flag_description" TEXT /* Description of the flag */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("store_and_fwd_flag")
)

CREATE TABLE "pickup_locations" (
  "location_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each pickup location */,
  "pickup_longitude" REAL /* Longitude of the pickup location */,
  "pickup_latitude" REAL /* Latitude of the pickup location */,
  "location_type" TEXT /* Type of location (e.g., airport, landmark) */,
  "location_name" TEXT /* Name of the pickup location */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("location_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "dropoff_locations" (
  "location_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each dropoff location */,
  "dropoff_longitude" REAL /* Longitude of the dropoff location */,
  "dropoff_latitude" REAL /* Latitude of the dropoff location */,
  "location_type" TEXT /* Type of location (e.g., airport, landmark) */,
  "location_name" TEXT /* Name of the dropoff location */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("location_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "users" (
  "user_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each user */,
  "user_name" TEXT /* Full name of the user */,
  "email" TEXT /* Email address of the user */,
  "role" TEXT /* Role of the user (e.g., analyst, administrator) */,
  "password" TEXT /* Password for the user */,
  "role_description" TEXT /* Description of the role */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("user_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_users_role FOREIGN KEY ("role") REFERENCES roles ("role_name")
)

CREATE TABLE "access_logs" (
  "access_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each access event */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user accessing the trip data */,
  "trip_id" INTEGER /* ID of the trip being accessed */,
  "access_date" TEXT /* Date when the trip data was accessed */,
  "access_type" TEXT /* Type of access (e.g., view, download) */,
  "access_ip" TEXT /* IP address of the access event */,
  "access_device" TEXT /* Device used for the access event */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("access_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_access_logs_trip_id FOREIGN KEY ("trip_id") REFERENCES trips ("trip_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_access_logs_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "trip_trends" (
  "trend_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each trend event */,
  "trip_id" INTEGER /* ID of the trip being tracked */,
  "trend_date" TEXT /* Date when the trend was observed */,
  "trend_type" TEXT /* Type of trend (e.g., surge, decline) */,
  "trend_value" REAL /* Value of the trend */,
  "trend_description" TEXT /* Description of the trend */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("trend_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_trip_trends_trip_id FOREIGN KEY ("trip_id") REFERENCES trips ("trip_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "roles" (
  "role_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each role */,
  "role_name" TEXT /* Name of the role */,
  "role_description" TEXT /* Description of the role */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("role_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "permissions" (
  "permission_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each permission */,
  "role_id" INTEGER /* ID of the role associated with the permission */,
  "permission_name" TEXT /* Name of the permission */,
  "permission_description" TEXT /* Description of the permission */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("permission_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_permissions_role_id FOREIGN KEY ("role_id") REFERENCES roles ("role_id")
)
